name: yieldswarm-entropy-circuits
description: ZK circuits for hardware telemetry entropy proofs

scripts.build: npm run compile && npm run setup
scripts.build:all: npm run compile && npm run compile:reputation && npm run setup && npm run setup:reputation
scripts.export-vkey: npx snarkjs zkey export verificationkey build/entropy_proof_final.zkey build/verification_key.json
scripts.export-vkey:reputation: npx snarkjs zkey export verificationkey build/reputation_score_final.zkey build/reputation_verification_key.json
